name: Sridhar Malladi
summary: Data Scientist with 3+ years building ML models (XGBoost, regression), running experiments, and turning data into dashboards for non-technical stakeholders across product, pricing, and growth.

experience.title: Data Scientist
bullets: Designed and analyzed 40+ A/B tests across pricing, onboarding, and feature flows with statistical significance and power analysis, shipping 6 wins that lifted conversion by 18%.
Built and deployed customer behavior and retention models on AWS + Databricks using XGBoost and logistic regression, lifting prediction accuracy by 31% across 3 customer segments.
Automated recurring analytics and reporting by integrating fine-tuned LLMs and RAG into internal tools, cutting 5+ hours/week of manual pulls and stakeholder turnaround from 2 days to 1 hour.
Built a model evaluation and monitoring framework across 3 production models using MLflow and statistical drift detection, cutting issue detection from 4 hours to 12 minutes at 99.6% uptime.
Delivered executive Tableau dashboards integrating product, revenue, and customer data, replacing weekly static reports with real-time KPI visibility across 4 business units.

experience.title: Graduate Teaching Assistant
bullets: Mentored 100+ graduate students across Statistics, Probability, and Applied Analytics over 4 semesters, running weekly office hours on Python, regression, and model evaluation, building the statistical foundation behind ML.

experience.title: Data Engineer
bullets: Built and automated ETL pipelines in Python, SQL, and Airflow on AWS, cutting data prep time by 60% and enabling reliable ingestion for downstream modeling and reporting.
Trained ML models (logistic regression, random forest, gradient boosting) on customer data, lifting prediction accuracy by 23% across churn, segmentation, and demand forecasting.
Built Power BI dashboards and automated reporting adopted by 3 cross-functional teams, replacing 10 hours/week of manual work with self-serve insights for business stakeholders.

projects.name: DSBuddy
projects.description: AI assistant that auto-profiles datasets, builds feature graphs, and generates Jupyter notebooks using cost-optimized Claude Haiku/Sonnet routing.

projects.name: RAGLens
projects.description: Live benchmarking tool comparing 4 RAG configurations: baseline through fine-tuned + hybrid retrieval with real-time RAGAS scoring to quantify what each component adds.

education.degree: Master of Science in Data Science and Analytics
